title: ferray-numpy-interop: expansion epic — f16/bf16, complex, DynArray, nulls, DataFrame, RecordBatch
description:
Consolidates the remaining gaps after the #551-#559 audit:

1. f16/bf16 ArrowElement / NpElement / PolarsElement (#551)
2. Complex<f32>/Complex<f64> NpElement and Arrow round-trip via FixedSizeBinary or struct (#552)
3. DynArray <-> Arrow / NumPy / Polars conversions dispatching on runtime dtype (#554)
4. Null handling: from_arrow_with_fill, from_arrow_masked -> MaskedArray (#556)
5. Polars DataFrame <-> 2D ferray Array (to_dataframe / from_dataframe) (#558)
6. Arrow RecordBatch <-> Vec<DynArray> with name preservation (#559)

Each item is independent and can ship separately; bundled here so the cluster has one umbrella to track scope and coordinate the trait/dtype additions that several share.
